basic_info.about: IIT Madras is one of the premier public technical universities in India, recognized as an Institute of Eminence. It is known for its rigorous academic programs, research excellence, and a thriving startup ecosystem, consistently topping national rankings.
basic_info.summary: Established in 1959 with German assistance, the institute is located in a 617-acre residential campus in Chennai. It offers various undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs across 16 departments and several research centers.
basic_info.recognition: Institute of Eminence (IoE), Government of India

contact_info.address: IIT Madras, Sardar Patel Road, Adyar, Chennai - 600036, Tamil Nadu, India

placements.graduate_outcomes_note: Placement season 2025-26 is currently ongoing as of March 2026, with over 2,000 students and 300 companies registered.

placements.placement_highlights: IIT Madras recorded a historic highest package of INR 4.3 Crore PA from Jane Street during the 2024-25 season. The institute maintained a strong 80% placement rate for B.Tech students with an average package of 22 LPA, while the MBA program achieved 100% placement consistently.

fees.fees_note: IIT Madras B.Tech tuition fees are typically ₹1,00,000 per semester for General/OBC candidates, while M.Tech fees are lower at ₹25,000 per semester. SC/ST and PwD students receive a 100% tuition fee waiver. Total costs include one-time admission fees, refundable deposits, and recurring semester charges like establishment and medical fees.

scholarships_detail.name: Institute Merit-cum-Means (MCM) Scholarship
scholarships_detail.eligibility: 67% tuition fee waiver for students with family income between 1-5 Lakhs; full waiver below 1 Lakh

scholarships_detail.name: Inspire Scholarship
scholarships_detail.eligibility: All students admitted to the BS plus MS programme
scholarships_detail.provider: Department of Science and Technology, Govt of India

scholarships_detail.name: Aditya Birla Scholarship
scholarships_detail.eligibility: Top 20 students in JEE Advanced rank

infrastructure.details: 617-acre lush green residential campus in Chennai.
First university-based research park in India, fostering industry-academia collaboration.
Includes an Olympic-standard swimming pool, cricket stadium, football ground, and multiple indoor courts.
High-performance computing center with 10 petaflops capacity and 12,000 CPUs.
Institute hospital with specialists (cardiology, ortho, etc.) and Apollo pharmacy tie-up.

hostel_details.type: Residential (20-22 hostels named after Indian rivers; separate blocks for male and female students)

scholarships.name: Institute Merit-Cum-Means (MCM) Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Annual family income ≤ 4.5 Lakhs; top 25% of admitted students; maintain CGPA ≥ 5.0

scholarships.name: Saireddy Comprehensive Undergraduate Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Top rank in JEE Advanced; family income 5-8 Lakhs; B.Tech/Dual Degree

scholarships.name: Never Settle Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: B.Tech/Dual Degree (CS/EE); income 5-8 Lakhs; based on JEE Advanced rank

scholarships.name: Sriram Srinivasan Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: JEE Advanced top rank; income 1-5.5 Lakhs; maintain CGPA ≥ 6.5

scholarships.name: Ram Shriram Merit Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: 32 fresh students; JEE Advanced rank; income < 8 Lakhs; maintain CGPA ≥ 6.5

scholarships.name: Institute SC/ST Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: SC/ST students; family income ≤ 4.5 Lakhs; includes free messing and pocket allowance

scholarships.name: ICCR Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: International students; covers tuition and accommodation
